articles.title: Watch Out: Vitalik Buterin’s Twitter Account Has Been Hacked – Don’t Click on the Link He Shared
articles.description: The Twitter (X) account of Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin appears to have been hacked. Be careful about sharing from the account. Continue Reading: Watch Out: Vitalik Buterin’s Twitter Account Has Been Hacked – Don’t Click on the Link He Shared

articles.title: SEC Files Appeal Against Ripple as Legal Battle Intensifies
articles.description: The SEC levels allegations against Ripple, accusing the company of stalling resolution to preserve unregulated XRP sales.
